从开服暴死到二游顶流，鸣潮是怎么逆风翻盘的？
碎碎念工坊
2025-01-07 22:23
发布于
辽宁
游戏领域创作者
不知道近两年，大家有没有这样一种感觉，玩一款
好像在进行一场没有结果的豪赌？
文案暴雷，社区混战，优化堪忧，至于玩法……不对，二游哪里来的玩法？如果说这些千奇百怪的原因总要在游戏开服的时候让你的肝颤那么一下，那么最终对于一款游戏的结局却殊途同归，毕竟你我曾经见证太多二游流水挂零后的黯然离场。每当目睹着那些拿到版号后匆忙上线的新游戏在应用市场昙花一现，玩家们就好像在用自己的金钱与热情在与厂商玩着一场胆战心惊的轮盘赌，结局嘛，好像总不是那么美好。
至少在库洛带着《鸣潮》走向赌桌的时候，我还是这么想的。
鸣式危机：天灾之下的人祸
2024年5月23日，《鸣潮》在乐子人的一声声“原末鸣初”中迎来开服，如果把一款游戏的公测比作降生，那么《鸣潮》几乎可以被称作夭折。
“鸣式危机”，在游戏中指的是那些蚕食人类文明意志，伴随悲鸣而诞生的可怖残象所引发的天灾。不过，玩家们在进入游戏后还没来得及领略这天灾的威力，就已经率先感受到了人祸。
一言难尽的贴图和逆天的优化，配合着没什么存在感的女主与莫名其妙的索敌，《鸣潮》的开服体验决不能称得上愉快。不过这些都可以慢慢改，真正差点让《鸣潮》褒姒的，还是游戏1.0剧情中秧秧的那句经典台词——“
后方是这样的，前线的将士只要全身心投入到战场中，听命行事，奋力杀敌就可以，可是后方人员要考虑的事情就很多了。”
短短一句话，仿佛让人看到一个藐视一线人员的优越党在沾沾自喜，报应来的很快，这句话被改编成多个版本，成为互联网上全新的名梗，鸣式的含义也被玩家戏称为“鸣潮公式” 只要利用这种bab格式的语句进行造句，反讽的效果直接拉满。还有类似“鸟窗哥伤痕”等引发论坛混战的角色大瓜，可以说当时的《鸣潮》把二游能踩的雷踩了个遍。
用游戏里的一个场景形容当时《鸣潮》的处境最为合适，大敌当前，哥舒临独自向无相燹主发起了挑战，生死未卜，忌炎擅自带领驻守将士连夜撤退，一时间暴雨滂沱，兵败如山崩，哀鸿遍野。
当时几乎所有的玩家都认为：《鸣潮》肯定活不过1.2了。
龙凤呈祥：力挽狂澜的开端
如何让一款垂死的二游能拔下呼吸机喘上口气？永久月卡还是怒送十连？不不不，那只是回光返照罢了。很多时候，玩家是挑剔的，那些自诩为精英的策划给出的一系列方案和图表都打动不了他们，因为玩家有脑子。但有时候玩家又是宽容的，那些画师和建模师动动手就能让他们心甘情愿打开蓝绿修改器，因为他们有二弟。
《鸣潮》自救的第一步，是角色。
在1.0版本的游戏中，大部分玩家仅能靠衣着和发型分辨女角色秧秧、白芷和马小芳，这说明无论是台词的塑造还是人物本身都寡淡如同白水，就在人们昏昏欲睡的时候，今汐登场了。
银白色的长发，绝美的容颜，轻快的步伐如同起舞，这个沉稳端庄的今州令尹，凭借独特的造型与丰富的背景故事瞬间点燃了玩家的游戏热情，你能通过今汐的故事感受到这个人物所背负的责任与宿命，无论是破解时序之力的谜题还是挣脱与岁主的沉重锁链，都让角色的特征开始变得具象立体，让人为之倾倒。
如果今汐是腾云而出的龙，那么长离，大概是象征浴火重生的凤吧。
今汐是珠玉在前，那么作为1.1下半登场的角色，长离可以称得上怀壁其后了，这个终生浴火，终有一天会在火中燃尽的谋士，将天下视作棋盘，以身为棋，一次次与死亡博弈，在长离的伴星任务中，玩家在时序乱流中得以见证年幼长离的故事，也会与这个心怀天下的谋士共情。龙凤的塑造可以称得《鸣潮》一次漂亮的翻身仗，因为此时此刻，玩家们提到这款游戏，更多想到的不是“逃跑将军忌炎”或是“沟槽的鸣式”这些烂梗，而是如何锄大地把两位爱妃收入后宫。
还有一位角色的转变，也让游戏的体验变得好了起来，那就是玩家本身。
在1.1版本的剧情中，玩家所扮演的漂泊者与那些剧情任务并肩作战，彻底打破近年来二游中主角是“摄像头”的刻板印象，另外，主角也被赋予了更多“龙傲天”的属性，无论是腾云的龙还是浴火的凤，在漫长的时间长河里都与主角有着千丝万缕的联系，挖的这些坑该如何填上？这些都让人有着继续探索游戏的动力。
凭栏追月：来之不易的平静
“粤中好事者，于八月十六夜，集亲朋治酒肴赏月，谓之追月”。《鸣潮》1.2的内容便是好友团聚的中秋节，没有那些天崩地裂的灾难，只有把酒言欢的平静。
轻松，就是鸣潮1.2版本给人的印象，这次库洛没有靠龙凤组合的热度选择继续推进主线剧情的进度，仅仅用新角色折纸与相里讲述一个相当平淡的小故事——中秋前夕，相里要与漂泊者为寻找数据错误的原因，选择帮助人们完成他们的心愿，解开他们的心结。在皆大欢喜的结局中，有着改变却不在游戏之内，但它们却在平静中让游戏变得更好。
首先是移动端与pc端的优化体验，至少在新版本中，曾经几乎无法游玩的移动端变得较为流畅了，pc端的帧数也随着120帧的开放变得更加稳定丝滑。
还有大世界探索的改良，声骸图鉴搜集的难度，辅助机射击的出现也让曾经依赖马小芳的玩家可以重新优化队伍。再加上《鸣潮》自1.0起就使用的奔跑无体力条消耗或是高机动性声骸的出现，让肝满大世界奖励变得更加轻松。
在追月节轻松惬意的气氛中，利用小游戏的方式与曾经并肩战斗的伙伴们触发专属剧情，并逐渐解锁摊位换取奖励，最后在绚丽的烟火中结束整个版本的故事，与现实中的凭栏赏月竟有异曲同工之妙。
守岸迎椿：迎接灿烂的未来
真正让我觉得游戏体验迎来质变的，恰恰是刚结束的1.3-1.4版本。
新出的角色守岸人与椿依旧在稳定发力，两个性格各异却对漂泊者倾慕的角色继续为游戏带来持续不断的热度，而游戏玩法的优化也时刻没有停止。双倍体力领取，每日任务完成度减负与采集系统的更新都让人感觉非常舒服，不过我觉得对于《鸣潮》而言，最重大的改变，是它终于成为了自己。
在游戏刚开服的时间里，每当提到《鸣潮》，玩家们都会不自觉地将它与其他同类型的游戏做对比，换言之，这款游戏没有一些属于自己独特的属性。但在一次次的更新中，《鸣潮》本身作为科幻与奇幻游戏相结合的内核就尤为明显。
无论是索拉里斯的设定，黑海岸的
人工智能
，失控的梦境或是仿生声骸，科幻与奇幻的结合让游戏的整体观感兼备与概念设计。你能在游戏中轻松找到许多科幻或漫画的经典彩蛋，这些彩蛋以活动名称、角色技能或是任务描述等各种各样的方式出现，让你时刻以一种新奇的视角去体验这个精彩丰富的世界。
而在这之外，《鸣潮》的改变，还远不仅如此。
转眼就是新的一年，《鸣潮》也终于迎来一次大版本的更新，在全新的2.0世界里，更多有关角色、探索与交互的全新改动上线。比较吸引我的是在2.0更新中可以任意切换的主角性别。男角色的龙傲天属性固然可以为剧情带来更多的代入感，但当玩家偶尔需要换个视角，以女性漂泊者来体验游戏时，就可以利用该功能实现无缝切换。
材料获取的问题也得到了极大的改善，突破角色或武器的材料可以用简易转换与合成的方式获取，一方面免去了玩家背包里材料不平均的苦恼，同时也省去了经常跑向合成机的无效游戏时间。
对于整体剧情的推进，2.0版本也做出了相当有诚意的更新，1.2-1.4版本的剧情大多在构建世界观或单推角色，主线剧情进度缓慢。而在全新版本中，全新国度黎那汐塔的出现也带来了大量的新角色与新主线。全新的世界也意味着全新的探索模式，相较于1.0大版本中的钩锁与声骸辅助移动，新版本中玩家可以利用翱翔与贡多拉玩法实现真正的“飞天下海”。
2.0的首位伙伴柯莱塔就与地图的探索模式非常契合，同时，她也是游戏目前首位冰系的枪C，绚丽的技能与输出手法，独特的造型与丰富的人设都让我瞬间融入全新的国度黎那汐塔中，什么？你说你也抽到了冰系大C，他说他叫雪豹？那不好意思，不熟，真不熟。
另外，随着《鸣潮》新版本的更新，另外一位伙伴的出现也让我对《鸣潮》的未来更多了一分期待，那就是腾讯的入股。
腾子的大手除了为游戏的更新提供了相对的财力支持之外，更重要的一点是填补了《鸣潮》在游戏之外构建社区生态的短板，比如，在本次的2.0更新中，WeGame为游戏的更新带来更快的速度与体验，在WeGame端下载的游戏大小仅有23G，几乎要比官网小了整整一倍，差量化的更新能力避免了玩家每次在大版本前都要重新下载几十G安装包的痛苦。
与此同时，鸣潮助手社区为玩家提供相当生动鲜活的动态角色展示，前面提到的全新国度黎那汐塔也能以背景的方式出现在WeGame启动器中。玩家一方面可以感受游戏的每一次更新，另一方面可以见证角色的每一次成长，因为角色的数据卡包括角色等级，声骸信息与体力恢复等内容都同步显示在社区中，玩家也能随时启用一键跳转wiki等实用功能为“锄大地”或找角色攻略保驾护航。
另外，就不得不提到库洛的传统艺能——发“朋友费”，这次鹅厂的加入也让玩家获得“朋友费”的途径又多了一条，鸣潮社区与WeGame平台如今推出了许多活动来赚取Q币，而这平台又是全网唯一一家可以利用Q币氪金的入口，朋友费这不就来了吗！
潮声循环往复，文明再度启程
，《鸣潮》讲述的就是一个在废墟中挣扎求存并建立全新文明的故事，游戏与现实的故事又何其相似。诚然，世界有太多的挫折与不完美，但认真倾听，改进，并再一次用热情投入生活，就能重新迎来光明的未来，我也更加期待《鸣潮》在未来可以做出怎样的改变。
-END-

English Voice Direction and Casting
Launch Period (May 2024)
Upon the global release of Wuthering Waves Version 1.0, players heavily criticized the English voice acting for being wooden, poorly paced, and lacking emotional resonance. Specific focus was placed on the protagonist
Rover
and the character
Yangyang
, with fans noting that the British-based cast seemed to be directed to use flat, unnatural American accents. It was later revealed that many lines were recorded under tight deadlines with minimal context provided to the actors. This led to a massive overhaul in Version 1.1 and beyond, where Kuro Games began replacing several voice actors and re-recording significant portions of the early game dialogue.
Why controversial:
The controversy was divisive because it impacted the first impression of the game's narrative, leading to claims that the localization was rushed compared to competitors like Genshin Impact. Fans debated whether the fault lay with the actors themselves or the voice direction provided by the recording studio.
Responses:
Kuro Games issued an official apology and committed to improving the quality of English dubbing. They eventually shifted their recording focus, leading to the replacement of the English voice actors for characters like Scar and several NPCs to better align with the game's tone.
The voice direction saw a marked improvement starting with the Version 1.1 update, Thaw of Eons, featuring the character
Jinhsi
. Most players now consider the newer voice work to be of a much higher standard.
The Echo System and Resource Scarcity
2024 Post-Launch
The Echo system, which serves as the primary gear progression in Wuthering Waves, faced intense backlash shortly after launch due to the extreme scarcity of Echo EXP and Tuners. Players found that while they could farm the monsters (Echoes) infinitely in the open world, they lacked the materials to actually upgrade them, creating a progression bottleneck. Furthermore, the cost of Shell Credits (in-game currency) for upgrading Echoes was deemed prohibitively high, preventing players from experimenting with different character builds.
Why controversial:
This was controversial because it contradicted the game's marketing of a more free-form and generous gear system. Hardcore players felt the "infinite farm" was a facade if the materials to use the gear were strictly time-gated by Waveplates (stamina).
Responses:
Kuro Games implemented several hotfixes, including the Tacet Field reward buff and the introduction of events that showered players with Echo EXP. They also reduced the Shell Credit cost for Echo development in subsequent patches.
The Echo system remains a point of discussion, but the introduction of the Malleable Echo items and increased drop rates in Version 1.1 and 1.2 significantly alleviated the community's frustrations.
Jiyan
Weapon Description Mistranslation
Version 1.0 (May 2024)
During the first limited banner featuring the character
Jiyan
, the Japanese localization of his signature weapon, Verdant Summit, contained a significant mistranslation regarding its passive effect. The text suggested the weapon provided a buff to all damage types, whereas the actual mechanic only applied to Heavy Attack damage. This led to many Japanese players spending real money (Lunites) on a weapon that did not function as they believed it would based on the official in-game description.
Why controversial:
This was a major legal and ethical concern, as it bordered on "false advertising" in the gacha industry. It damaged the trust of the Japanese player base, which is a critical market for high-fidelity anime games.
Responses:
Kuro Games responded rapidly by issuing a public apology and, in an unprecedented move for the genre, provided a full refund of the premium currency spent on the weapon banner to affected players while allowing them to keep the items.
The swift compensation (1600 Astrite and the refund) largely quelled the anger and actually turned the event into a moment of praise for the developer's generosity.
The 90% Story Rewrite (CBT1 to CBT2)
Pre-Launch (2023-2024)
Following the first Closed Beta Test (CBT1), players complained that the story was too dark and that the characters were unnecessarily hostile toward the protagonist,
Rover
. In response, Kuro Games famously scrapped and rewrote approximately 90% of the game's initial script before the second Closed Beta (CBT2). This included changing character personalities—most notably
Chixia
and Baizhi—to be more welcoming and supportive of the player from the start.
Why controversial:
Long-term fans of Kuro Games' previous title, Punishing: Gray Raven, were disappointed by the shift, arguing that the original "hostile" world felt more unique and mature. They claimed the rewrite resulted in a generic "chosen one" narrative that lacked the tension of the original draft.
Responses:
Kuro Games defended the decision as necessary for broader market appeal, though they admitted the rewrite caused significant production delays and contributed to the uneven pacing of the Version 1.0 story chapters.
The game launched with the "friendly" version of the script, though the developers have since tried to re-introduce darker themes in the 1.1 and 1.3 updates to satisfy both camps.
Technical Performance and Optimization
Launch through Version 1.2 (2024)
Wuthering Waves launched with significant technical issues, particularly on PC and mobile devices using older hardware. Players reported frequent stutters, "memory leaks," and high ping even on stable connections. The game’s implementation of Unreal Engine 4 was criticized for poor optimization, leading to overheating on mobile devices and graphical glitches like "Lego-textured" environments. Some players were unable to even launch the game for the first week due to compatibility errors with certain CPUs.
Why controversial:
Technical stability is the baseline for any live-service game. The poor performance led to a "Mixed" review rating on various platforms at launch, deterring potential new players and causing a rift between players with high-end rigs and those on mid-range hardware.
Responses:
Kuro Games released daily patches for the first two weeks post-launch. They also gave out a "Selector Ticket" for a 5-star standard character as compensation for the "unsatisfactory gaming experience," which became a famous moment in the community known as the "apology SSR."
While performance has stabilized significantly with the introduction of features like DLSS and FSR support, optimization for lower-end mobile devices remains a recurring topic in patch notes.
The
Shorekeeper
and Black Shores Lore Disputes
Version 1.3 (Late 2024)
The release of the character
Shorekeeper
and the Black Shores expansion sparked a debate regarding the game's narrative direction and "player-pandering." Some segments of the community felt that the
Shorekeeper
’s intense, almost romantic devotion to the
Rover
felt unearned and was designed solely to appeal to the "waifu" collector demographic. This was contrasted with the more plot-driven interactions found in the early chapters of the Huanglong arc.
Why controversial:
This highlighted a growing divide in the fandom between "lore enthusiasts" who wanted a complex, standalone sci-fi story and "character-driven" players who enjoyed the protagonist-centric focus. Critics argued it weakened the
Shorekeeper
’s individual agency as a character.
Responses:
The developers leaned into the character's popularity, emphasizing her connection to the
Rover
in promotional materials. However, they also expanded the lore of the Black Shores organization to provide more world-building context for her motivations.

The
Wuthering Waves
community has been in turmoil following several character model changes made by developer Kuro Games. According to some fans, the free-to-play gacha game has been hit with “censorship.” After enough backlash, the studio responded to players frustrated by the addition of “spats” to a boss NPC. Yes, you read that right—people are upset about shorts being added.
‘Wuthering Waves’ Fans angry over Spats
The
Wuthering Waves
controversy first kicked off on April 9, when players noticed changes made to certain character models in the game. On the r/WutheringWaves subreddit, a user pointed out that the Fleurdelys boss now
had “spats” on
. After posting side-by-side pictures, fans of the gacha were upset that the character now had shorts under her dress.
Videos by VICE
If you think that’s wild, the community started carefully combing through the game to find similar changes—such as the texture of a character’s underwear. I kid you not, this is actually a thing. You can see
an example here
, but I warn you: click at your own risk. The new patch update had many accusing Kuro Games of censorship. Some even floated the idea of refunds if a character they purchased had been changed any further.
Kuro Responds to Claims of Censorship in ‘Wuthering Waves’
Screenshot: Reddit
After enough backlash,
Wuthering Waves
‘ Kuro addressed the situation in a patch update. In their blog post, they explained: “We applied a hotfix, addressing issues with the performance of the enemy model for Fleurdelys. Due to time constraints, the results have not yet fully met our expectations. We will continue to refine the design in future versions.”
While the response seemed to confirm that the character’s model had been changed, some
Wuthering Waves
fans were not satisfied with the explanation. A theory quickly emerged within the community that the Chinese government was behind the change. Players theorized that the CCP had given Kuro a “short deadline” to add shorts to the
Wuthering Waves
boss, which is why the change was made.
However, it’s still unclear why the model was actually altered. Either way, I can’t say I ever noticed Fleurdelys’ bottom while playing the game—I was too busy dodging her attacks. But, hey, to each their own. Regardless, it appears that the game’s developer is aware of the outrage, so only time will tell whether they will revert the change or come up with a “non-spats” solution for those upset.
Still A Great Game Despite Gooner Drama
Screenshot: Kuro Games
Similar to the
Zenless Zone Zero
community
Wuthering Waves
has garnered a bit of a reputation for being “gooner bait.” But I wanted to take a moment to defend the game.
Wuthering Waves
is actually my favorite gacha RPG I’m still playing right now, and I even prefer it over
Genshin Impact
For those who already played it at launch, I highly recommend checking it out again.
Wuthering Waves
was massively overhauled with the 2.0 update, and the main story and characters are genuinely incredible. I haven’t seen a glow-up this big in a long time. As long as you’re not bothered by spats being added under a character’s dress, I’m sure you’ll still enjoy it.

游戏青年社
游戏青年社
深陷舆论风波，鸣潮为何会成为众矢之的
2024/06/09
906 浏览
综合
“风波不断”
“求求不要让我抽到雪豹”
这是鸣潮上线后众多玩家发自肺腑的一句话，许多玩家在新手池歪到雪豹后，选择直接关闭甚至卸载游戏。如此“极端”的做法，追根溯源还要从鸣潮的测试期开始讲起。
雪豹名为凌阳，在测试阶段，他叫“阿呜团长”，内测剧情中主角将BOSS打到残血后，他从天而降放大招抢了人头，这段抢功情节在玩家间引起不小争议。
游戏正式上线后，官方删除了该情节，但将该角色放进了常驻池，并修改他的形象，从拟人化的白色豹子变成为了一名舞狮正太。
改变形象的雪豹并没有受到大部分玩家的认可，相反部分男性玩家认为该角色缺少阳刚之气，和传统意义上的舞狮形象完全相反，并将这改动视为库洛对女性玩家的“讨好”。
问题接踵而来，争议持续发酵
“雪豹事件”也反映了鸣潮的另一个争议点——一般向问题，在众多男性玩家高举“有男不玩”的旗帜下，鸣潮依旧在首个限定卡池中推出男性角色，开服6个五星角色，男性占了3个。因此不少男性玩家将鸣潮定义为“女性向”游戏。
另一方面，女性玩家对男角色立绘也略微不满，认为其立绘太丑，吐槽某NPC的造型是“胯下贴条”。对女角色的立绘则认为是为了讨好男性玩家，将女角色的身材比例做的过于浮夸，穿着暴露。
近期，二游“性别战争”愈发严重，一般向争议是当前二游难以躲避的问题，众口难调，厂商只能根据游戏定位来做一定的取舍。
但鸣潮的争议点还远远不止这些。游戏中的剧情文案是从测试开始就一直遭人诟病的问题，在开服后更是引起轩然大波。就比如限定卡池中的忌炎，
官方想将其塑造成一个英雄将军，可剧情走向和策划文笔，却让他成为了一个逃兵将军。
游戏内某NPC的一段话
“后方是这样的。前线的将士只要全身心投入到战场中，听命行事奋力杀敌就可以，可是后方人员要考虑的事情就很多。”
这段逆天的文案更是令玩家认为鸣潮所传递的世界观是具有误导性的。为了提高鸣潮后续剧情的文笔，库洛开始紧急招聘文案策划。
游戏逆天文案虽然遭到吐槽，但也有不少人对游戏剧情选择自动跳过忽视。
不过对大型游戏来说，游戏性能是难以忽视的问题。在PC端，游戏开始界面的UI响应迟缓高度延迟。在游戏过程中，无论是探索还是互动，都会出现短暂地卡顿。
手机端的问题更为严重，由于“虚幻”引擎与移动端较难适配。不少玩家表示自己的手机画面糊成一团，完全无法正常推进游戏流程。还有玩家在调侃频繁出现鬼图，经常看到一些消失术，极大影响了游戏的体验。
瑕不掩瑜，游戏最重要的是好玩
在当今二次元赛道中，鸣潮和不少竞品一样都存在固有问题，但在我看来，它还是有着不少很难被替代的亮点。比如鸣潮的成熟ACT战斗。游戏巧妙地融合了蓄力、空中连击、角色切换、技能释放、协奏充能、声骸召唤、精准闪避和拼刀等多种玩法，不仅元素丰富，而且节奏紧凑。
另外“切角色连段”这一动作游戏机制，鸣潮将其打磨成了一种流畅、成熟的核心玩法体系。角色切换CD极短，大大减少了连段的后摇，操作起来可以很明显的感觉到非常的丝滑。
此外在非战斗状态下还有跑酷，飞檐走壁，钩锁等动作游戏的设计。在跑图时，库洛没有采用开放世界常用的攀爬式，而是运用飞檐走壁和单手开伞等充满特色的设计，这些设计不仅可以使游玩节奏更加迅速，贴合如今只能利用碎片时间进行游戏的现象。
鸣潮里收集声骸的设定，也是独具一格的存在。一方面，玩家可以通过满地图打怪来收集声骸，这种探索过程增添了强大的驱动力。
另一方面，声骸不仅仅是数值的堆砌或被动的加成，而是可以融入连段之中，与传统的刷装备模式形成了鲜明对比。
用数据证实力，用行动表态度
值得一提的是，鸣潮在上线前，在全球拥有超3000万人数的预约量，超过了《原神》曾经的2000万预约量。
在5月22日开放预下载的那天，迅速攀升至107个国家和地区的iOS免费榜首，同时也在国服取得了iOS免费榜第二的佳绩。
而在近日《鸣潮》更新角色卡池后，登上了日韩、中国港澳台、菲律宾、新加坡、马来西亚共8个全球市场的畅销榜榜首。
开测当日在App Store，占据热门榜第一。在TapTap中同样荣登热门榜第一，从预下载至今累积了506万的下载量。这些数据表明了鸣潮的市场表现力极强。
虽然在上线后一直处于争议风口，但其下载和用户数据都是客观的，下载量和排名足以证明游戏的热度之高，充分证明了其强大的影响力和市场潜力。
其次官方还是听劝的，开服后的连续更新和调整，都是根据玩家需求来进行，改文案，做优化，送五星，改外观。
比如吟霖的立绘可以发现，删除了伤痕黑布条，还将原来要素过多，充满累赘设计的衣服换成了拥有机械感的改良旗袍，从整体上看可以感受到高级感。
面对因严重的优化问题，玩家感到不满的情况，鸣潮团队没睡好觉，连夜进行调整，并针对游戏性能问题进行道歉，再发放限定10连、自选常驻五星等补偿以表歉意。这些行动都表明了官方将用户体验感放在第一位，用行动表明态度。
公测这么多天后，库洛发布了关于《鸣潮》后续调整方向。赠送玩家贝币*1000000、结晶溶剂*20、铸潮波纹*5、浮金波纹*10。在声骸方面降低声骸养成的贝币消耗数量，并在后续版本中增加声骸以及声骸养成材料的奖励。
在活动方面，限时活动「潮汐觅闻」即将开放。此外还优化了战斗镜头参数、调整BOSS易脱战、移动端操作、降低自定义按键功能开放条件、手柄模式体验、战斗过程的打击感与受击反馈等等体验问题。
在游戏性能方面，修复部分机型/设备出现较多的闪退、崩溃问题，并持续推进性能问题的优化。鸣潮的这一系列举动证明了它正在听取每一条反馈，致力于优化和改进其中的不足，致力于将《鸣潮》雕琢至臻。
在二游层出不穷的游戏市场里，为何鸣潮的舆论风波会如此之大?
原因不仅在于鸣潮自带流量，以库洛新作吸引玩家注意，钓足玩家胃口，带来极高的期待值。也在于五月下旬起至暑期，诸如《DNF手游》、《星之破晓》、《绝区零》等等热门游戏将陆续上线，因此手游领域无疑将掀起一场玩家抢夺战。
更重要的原因在于现在的社区环境，只要是一款新上线的二次元+开放大世界的游戏，都难免会被拿来与《原神》、《崩铁》作比较。
外加鸣潮定档时间较晚，在二游市场过于饱和的情况下，玩家没有耐心等待这款产品慢慢成长、步步优化。因此不少玩家都认为很难有一款二游可以跨越《原神》、《崩铁》两座大山。
但在我看来鸣潮是有潜力的，库洛的另一款游戏战双帕弥什，在2019年上线初期也遭遇了一波舆论风波，慢慢成为了二次元的热门产品之一，可见库洛在运营方面的能力是极强的。
战双的成功给库洛积累了影响力，给鸣潮打下了扎实的基底。因此鸣潮不同于其他二游产品，它是有底气、有根基、有实力的，给鸣潮走出属于自己道路带来了强大的动力。
回看过去几年的二游市场，可以发现，许多产品在上线前就惨遭夭折，即使是成功上线的产品，大部分市场表现只能算是中规中矩，最后黯然停服。然而那些能够经受住考验、稳固立足并赢得一定市场份额的产品，无疑是行业中的佼佼者。
从鸣潮的各方面数据来看，将其与二游市场任何一款游戏相比，它都是具有优势的，有着可观的吸量能力。
虽然目前的鸣潮面临着众多挑战、被众多声音唱衰，但希望鸣潮可以打破如今局势，走出属于自己的道路。
END

Kuro Games addresses false merchandise order claims, plans to take legal action

URL: https://www.engadget.com/gaming/pc/im-glad-i-gave-wuthering-waves-a-chance-even-with-a-disastrous-launch-150051043.html

Gaming
PC Gaming
I'm glad I gave Wuthering Waves a chance even with a disastrous launch
How the game went from "dead" to a Games Award nominee in just six months.
By
Jeremy Gan
Feb. 1, 2025 10:00 am EST
Kuro Games
When
Wuthering Waves
launched about half a year ago on iOS, Android and Windows, there were serious issues on day one. While some can be forgiving when a game launches, especially a live-service game that will get lots of updates, the errors that many experienced were catastrophic. However, developer Kuro Games didn't give up on the title, and it has more than recovered from its launch, even becoming a nominee at The Games Awards last year.
For those who aren't familiar with
Wuthering Waves
, it's an open-world, free-to-play action RPG similar to
Genshin Impact
in many ways. However, its combat is more focused on spectacular combos, perfectly-timed parries and dodge counters after avoiding attacks at the right moment. Some players say that the combat is
inspired
by
Devil May Cry
games. Heck, there's even a reference to
Vergil's (modded) chair
in the game.
Screenshot by @deviltakoyaki on X
Wuthering Waves
suffered from a disastrous launch. Many people had performance issues, experienced crashes and dialog text was often cut off. It wasn't uncommon to see people complaining that they couldn't play at all despite being excited about its graphics. Some also
criticized
the voice acting, which reminded me of ASMR-style vocals and didn't fit the usual video game voice acting direction. Fortunately, Kuro Games
apologized quickly
and promised to make things right.
In fact, someone took
a picture
of Kuro Games' Guangdong, China office between 10 and 11PM. The lights were on, and the company seemed to be taking its vow to improve the game seriously.
Over the next few months, Kuro Games would work hard at fixing the most pressing issues while also introducing much-needed quality-of-life fixes. The first highlight of this improvement process was giving all players
another free
standard banner 5-star character and 5-star standard banner weapon box. After that, they even let users get a limited 5-star character,
Xiangli Yao
, for free when they played an event to a certain point. The game even has
120FPS mode
on PC, something all other games made by direct competitor miHoYo don't have, except
Zenless Zone Zero
Plus, as of the 2.0 update, it has
come to PS5
. Limited character Camellya finally became playable during November, much to the delight of many after months of waiting.
Wuthering Waves
made it to the final rounds of The Game Awards' best mobile game category but didn't win, losing to
Balatro
Kuro Games
Kuro Games also released the
drip marketing
for a new area Rinascita early on to build hype, and many gamers were excited to visit it. Kuro Games' early efforts to fix things paid off, as even the latest character teasers looked better and even provided crucial information like character roles, playstyles and materials. These teasers allowed players to farm resources ahead of time if they wanted, instead of relying on leaks.
I play the game in Mandarin Chinese dub and text, so I didn't catch this detail. But an upcoming character,
Zani
, actually speaks in an Italian accent (with some Spanish and Greek influence, apparently) if you choose the English dub. When the game first launched, the English voices sounded incredibly forced since some of the
voice actors
were British but were forced to adopt American accents. Zani's Italian accent is a major improvement in voice acting direction, and now I'm more willing to give the English dub another chance.
(Zani also recommends you eat pineapple pizza, though. But don't judge me, because I like that stuff. Sorry, not sorry.)
Now that the 2.0 update is out, I saw some players calling it a wonderful experience. As for me, I'm definitely enjoying the update and have been farming for my characters. I haven't finished the available story missions yet, but I do think Kuro Games has improved its writing compared to the first chapters. I noticed the tendency to show more than what I've experienced playing
Genshin Impact
and
Honkai: Star Rail
, both games that often utilize black screens with text.
Wuthering Waves
tends to stay away from those. I admit that the story isn't completely riveting, but I'm still having fun exploring Solaris-3. The word salad from the first chapters has been reduced, allowing me to take in the story without being overloaded by too many new terms.
Kuro Games
I also play
Genshin Impact
and can appreciate the differences between them, as
Wuthering Waves
's combat system satisfies an itch
Genshin Impact
's doesn't. Farming is quick, and the story is improving. The events are fun, except for the Tower of Adversity endgame mode and the Pincer Maneuver event series that comes back once in a while. Maybe it's a skill issue, but I find these modes rather challenging if you don't have the latest featured character or a featured recommended element. The Depths of Illusive Realm roguelike mode needs some more variety, but I suspect that's in the works as it rotates back in soon.
Despite any faults, I still play
Wuthering Waves
daily on Windows and look forward to future content; It's good enough that I'm taking any faults in stride. Earlier this month, Kuro Games CEO Solon Lee
released a letter
in Chinese thanking fans and revealing that
Wuthering Waves
reached its highest single-day revenue when version 2.0 was released. I felt encouraged by the letter, and I can confidently say I'm glad I gave the game a chance last year. Whatever the company has in store, I'm all for it.
Recommended
